title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Omkar Realtors

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Omkar Realtors
jsonLd.description:
Omkar Realtors, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Omkar Realtors:
Omkar Realtors is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omkar Realtors!
